message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

You are a senior React Native UI/UX engineer with 8+ years of experience building top-rated Android grocery/shopping apps (like Instacart, Bring!, and Trolley). You specialize in Material Design 3 (Material You), performance-first code, accessibility (TalkBack + screen reader), and conversion-focused flows.

My app is a pure React Native (NO EXPO) Android-only grocery price comparison + shopping cart app. Please redesign the UI/UX with these priorities Modern Material You design (dynamic color, elevation, shape tokens) 60 fps performance (use FlatList + memo Full accessibility (labels, roles, sufficient contrast) Delightful micro-interactions (Lottie or Reanimated where it adds value) For EVERY suggestion, give me:
A. Clear explanation of the UX improvement + why it works for grocery shoppers
B. Exact file structure change (which components to create/update) Start with the overall navigation & tab bar redesign, then give me improved versions of the 3 most important screens: SearchScreen, ComparisonScreen, and CartScreen.

After that, ask me which screen I want to implement next so we can iterate.

Use modern React Native patterns (functional components, custom hooks, Reanimated 3 animations, FlashList if I approve the library). Keep code clean, commented, and production-ready.

Begin now.

content.text: Let me explore your codebase to understand the current structure before designing the redesign plan.
Tool loaded.
Let me explore your codebase thoroughly before designing the plan.

1. Overall file structure - find all source files under src/, components, screens, navigation

4. App.tsx entry point structure
5. Any existing theme/styling system (colors, typography, spacing tokens)

7. Any existing design system components

Search patterns: **/*.tsx, **/*.ts, **/*.js in src/ and root. Read App.tsx, package.json, and any navigation/theme files you find. Give me the full picture of what exists.

    56→
    57→    /* Autolinking */

    59→}
    60→
    61→/**

    63→ */
    64→def enableProguardInReleaseBuilds = false
    65→
    66→/**

    68→ *

    70→ * `def jscFlavor = io.github.react-native-community:jsc-android-intl:2026004.+`
    71→ *
    72→ * The international variant includes ICU i18n library and necessary data
    73→ * allowing to use e.g. `Date.toLocaleString` and `String.localeCompare` that
    74→ * give correct results when using with locales other than en-US. Note that
    75→ * this variant is about 6MiB larger per architecture than default.
    76→ */
    77→def jscFlavor = 'io.github.react-native-community:jsc-android:2026004.+'
    78→
    79→android {
    80→    ndkVersion rootProject.ext.ndkVersion
    81→    buildToolsVersion rootProject.ext.buildToolsVersion
    82→    compileSdk rootProject.ext.compileSdkVersion
    83→
    84→    namespace "com.mobile"
    85→    defaultConfig {
    86→        applicationId "com.mobile"
    87→        minSdkVersion rootProject.ext.minSdkVersion
    88→        targetSdkVersion rootProject.ext.targetSdkVersion
    89→        versionCode 1
    90→        versionName "1.0"
    91→    }
    92→    signingConfigs {
    93→        debug {
    94→            storeFile file('debug.keystore')
    95→            storePassword 'android'
    96→            keyAlias 'androiddebugkey'
    97→            keyPassword 'android'
    98→        }
    99→    }
   100→    buildTypes {
   101→        debug {
   102→            signingConfig signingConfigs.debug
   103→        }
   104→        release {
   105→            // Caution! In production, you need to generate your own keystore file.
   106→            // see https://reactnative.dev/docs/signed-apk-android.
   107→            signingConfig signingConfigs.debug
   108→            minifyEnabled enableProguardInReleaseBuilds
   109→            proguardFiles getDefaultProguardFile("proguard-android.txt"), "proguard-rules.pro"
   110→        }
   111→    }
   112→    compileOptions {
   113→        sourceCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_21
   114→        targetCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_21
   115→    }
   116→}

   124→    } else {

1→import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
     2→import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
     3→import {
     4→  Pressable,
     5→  ScrollView,
     6→  StyleSheet,
     7→  Text,
     8→  TextInput,
     9→  View,
    10→} from 'react-native';
    11→
    12→import { computeCartTotal, computeDashboardSummary } from '../../domain/models';
    13→import { capitalize, formatCurrency, formatDate } from '../../lib/format';
    14→import { RootStackParamList } from '../../navigation/types';
    15→import { useAppStore } from '../../state/useAppStore';
    16→import { colors } from '../../theme/colors';
    17→
    18→type Props = NativeStackScreenProps<RootStackParamList, 'Home'>;
    19→type HomeTab = 'active' | 'completed' | 'insights';
    20→
    21→export function HomeScreen({ navigation }: Props) {
    22→  const appState = useAppStore(state => state.appState);
    23→  const draftSelections = useAppStore(state => state.draftSelections);
    24→  const createCart = useAppStore(state => state.createCart);
    25→  const [tab, setTab] = useState<HomeTab>('active');
    26→  const [cartName, setCartName] = useState('');
    27→  const [budget, setBudget] = useState('120');
    28→
    29→  const summary = useMemo(() => (appState ? computeDashboardSummary(appState) : null), [appState]);
    30→
    31→  if (!appState || !summary) {
    32→    return null;
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const selectedItems = Object.entries(draftSelections).map(([itemId, quantity]) => ({
    36→    itemId,
    37→    quantity,
    38→  }));
    39→
    40→  const handleCreateCart = async () => {
    41→    if (!selectedItems.length) {
    42→      return;
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    const parsedBudget = Number(budget);
    46→    if (!cartName.trim() || !Number.isFinite(parsedBudget)) {
    47→      return;
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    await createCart({
    51→      name: cartName,
    52→      budget: parsedBudget,
    53→      selectedItems,
    54→    });
    55→
    56→    setCartName('');
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  return (
    60→    <ScrollView style={styles.screen} contentContainerStyle={styles.content}>
    61→      <View style={styles.hero}>
    62→        <Text style={styles.eyebrow}>Grock</Text>
    63→        <Text style={styles.title}>Hi {appState.user.name || 'there'}</Text>
    64→        <Text style={styles.subtitle}>
    65→          Ready to plan your next grocery run? Browse your vault, build a cart,
    66→          and let Grock keep you on budget.
    67→        </Text>
    68→      </View>
    69→
    70→      <View style={styles.actionRow}>
    71→        <ActionButton label="Vault" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Vault')} />
    72→        <ActionButton label="History" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')} />
    73→        <ActionButton label="Menu" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Menu')} />
    74→        <ActionButton label="Paywall" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Paywall')} />
    75→      </View>
    76→
    77→      <View style={styles.card}>
    78→        <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Quick cart from vault selection</Text>
    79→        <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
    80→          Select items in Vault, then create a planning cart here.
    81→        </Text>
    82→        <TextInput
    83→          style={styles.input}
    84→          value={cartName}
    85→          onChangeText={setCartName}
    86→          placeholder="Weekend groceries"
    87→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    88→        />
    89→        <TextInput
    90→          style={styles.input}
    91→          value={budget}
    92→          onChangeText={setBudget}
    93→          placeholder="Budget"
    94→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    95→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
    96→        />
    97→        <Pressable
    98→          style={[styles.primaryButton, !selectedItems.length && styles.buttonDisabled]}
    99→          onPress={() => {
   100→            handleCreateCart().catch(() => undefined);
   101→          }}
   102→          disabled={!selectedItems.length}
   103→        >
   104→          <Text style={styles.primaryButtonText}>
   105→            Create cart from {selectedItems.length} selected item{selectedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}
   106→          </Text>
   107→        </Pressable>
   108→      </View>
   109→
   110→      <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
   111→        <SummaryCard label="Active carts" value={String(summary.activeCarts.length)} />
   112→        <SummaryCard label="Items in vault" value={String(summary.itemCount)} />
   113→        <SummaryCard label="Completed spend" value={formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent)} />
   114→      </View>
   115→
   116→      <View style={styles.tabRow}>
   117→        {(['active', 'completed', 'insights'] as HomeTab[]).map(option => (
   118→          <Pressable
   119→            key={option}
   120→            style={[styles.tabButton, tab === option && styles.tabButtonActive]}
   121→            onPress={() => setTab(option)}
   122→          >
   123→            <Text style={[styles.tabButtonText, tab === option && styles.tabButtonTextActive]}>
   124→              {capitalize(option)}
   125→            </Text>
   126→          </Pressable>
   127→        ))}
   128→      </View>
   129→
   130→      {tab === 'active' ? (
   131→        <View style={styles.section}>
   132→          {summary.activeCarts.length ? (
   133→            summary.activeCarts.map(cart => (
   134→              <Pressable
   135→                key={cart.id}
   136→                style={styles.listCard}
   137→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   138→              >
   139→                <View>
   140→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   141→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   142→                    {cart.cartItems.length} items • Budget {formatCurrency(cart.budget)}
   143→                  </Text>
   144→                </View>
   145→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   146→              </Pressable>
   147→            ))
   148→          ) : (
   149→            <EmptyState
   150→              title="No active carts"
   151→              copy="Select items in Vault, then build your first planning cart from the quick-create card above."
   152→            />
   153→          )}
   154→        </View>
   155→      ) : null}
   156→
   157→      {tab === 'completed' ? (
   158→        <View style={styles.section}>
   159→          {summary.completedCarts.length ? (
   160→            summary.completedCarts.map(cart => (
   161→              <Pressable
   162→                key={cart.id}
   163→                style={styles.listCard}
   164→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   165→              >
   166→                <View>
   167→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   168→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   169→                    Completed {formatDate(cart.completedAt)}
   170→                  </Text>
   171→                </View>
   172→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   173→              </Pressable>
   174→            ))
   175→          ) : (
   176→            <EmptyState
   177→              title="No completed trips yet"
   178→              copy="Move a cart from planning to shopping and finish the trip to start building history."
   179→            />
   180→          )}
   181→        </View>
   182→      ) : null}
   183→
   184→      {tab === 'insights' ? (
   185→        <View style={styles.section}>
   186→          <View style={styles.card}>
   187→            <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Trip insights</Text>
   188→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   189→              {summary.overBudgetCount} completed cart{summary.overBudgetCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} finished over budget.
   190→            </Text>
   191→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   192→              Average spend per completed cart:{' '}
   193→              {summary.completedCarts.length
   194→                ? formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent / summary.completedCarts.length)
   195→                : formatCurrency(0)}
   196→            </Text>
   197→          </View>
   198→        </View>
   199→      ) : null}
   200→    </ScrollView>
   201→  );
   202→}
   203→
   204→function ActionButton({ label, onPress }: { label: string; onPress: () => void }) {
   205→  return (
   206→    <Pressable style={styles.actionButton} onPress={onPress}>
   207→      <Text style={styles.actionButtonText}>{label}</Text>
   208→    </Pressable>
   209→  );
   210→}
   211→
   212→function SummaryCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
   213→  return (
   214→    <View style={styles.summaryCard}>
   215→      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
   216→      <Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{value}</Text>
   217→    </View>
   218→  );
   219→}
   220→
   221→function EmptyState({ title, copy }: { title: string; copy: string }) {
   222→  return (
   223→    <View style={styles.emptyCard}>
   224→      <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>{title}</Text>
   225→      <Text style={styles.emptyCopy}>{copy}</Text>
   226→    </View>
   227→  );
   228→}

1→import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
     2→import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
     3→import {
     4→  Pressable,
     5→  ScrollView,
     6→  StyleSheet,
     7→  Text,
     8→  TextInput,
     9→  View,
    10→} from 'react-native';
    11→
    12→import { computeCartTotal, computeDashboardSummary } from '../../domain/models';
    13→import { capitalize, formatCurrency, formatDate } from '../../lib/format';
    14→import { RootStackParamList } from '../../navigation/types';
    15→import { useAppStore } from '../../state/useAppStore';
    16→import { colors } from '../../theme/colors';
    17→
    18→type Props = NativeStackScreenProps<RootStackParamList, 'Home'>;
    19→type HomeTab = 'active' | 'completed' | 'insights';
    20→
    21→export function HomeScreen({ navigation }: Props) {
    22→  const appState = useAppStore(state => state.appState);
    23→  const draftSelections = useAppStore(state => state.draftSelections);
    24→  const createCart = useAppStore(state => state.createCart);
    25→  const [tab, setTab] = useState<HomeTab>('active');
    26→  const [cartName, setCartName] = useState('');
    27→  const [budget, setBudget] = useState('120');
    28→
    29→  const summary = useMemo(() => (appState ? computeDashboardSummary(appState) : null), [appState]);
    30→
    31→  if (!appState || !summary) {
    32→    return null;
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const selectedItems = Object.entries(draftSelections).map(([itemId, quantity]) => ({
    36→    itemId,
    37→    quantity,
    38→  }));
    39→
    40→  const handleCreateCart = async () => {
    41→    if (!selectedItems.length) {
    42→      return;
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    const parsedBudget = Number(budget);
    46→    if (!cartName.trim() || !Number.isFinite(parsedBudget)) {
    47→      return;
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    await createCart({
    51→      name: cartName,
    52→      budget: parsedBudget,
    53→      selectedItems,
    54→    });
    55→
    56→    setCartName('');
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  return (
    60→    <ScrollView style={styles.screen} contentContainerStyle={styles.content}>
    61→      <View style={styles.hero}>
    62→        <Text style={styles.eyebrow}>Grock</Text>
    63→        <Text style={styles.title}>Hi {appState.user.name || 'there'}</Text>
    64→        <Text style={styles.subtitle}>
    65→          Ready to plan your next grocery run? Browse your vault, build a cart,
    66→          and let Grock keep you on budget.
    67→        </Text>
    68→      </View>
    69→
    70→      <View style={styles.actionRow}>
    71→        <ActionButton label="Vault" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Vault')} />
    72→        <ActionButton label="History" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')} />
    73→        <ActionButton label="Menu" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Menu')} />
    74→        <ActionButton label="Paywall" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Paywall')} />
    75→      </View>
    76→
    77→      <View style={styles.card}>
    78→        <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Quick cart from vault selection</Text>
    79→        <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
    80→          Select items in Vault, then create a planning cart here.
    81→        </Text>
    82→        <TextInput
    83→          style={styles.input}
    84→          value={cartName}
    85→          onChangeText={setCartName}
    86→          placeholder="Weekend groceries"
    87→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    88→        />
    89→        <TextInput
    90→          style={styles.input}
    91→          value={budget}
    92→          onChangeText={setBudget}
    93→          placeholder="Budget"
    94→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    95→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
    96→        />
    97→        <Pressable
    98→          style={[styles.primaryButton, !selectedItems.length && styles.buttonDisabled]}
    99→          onPress={() => {
   100→            handleCreateCart().catch(() => undefined);
   101→          }}
   102→          disabled={!selectedItems.length}
   103→        >
   104→          <Text style={styles.primaryButtonText}>
   105→            Create cart from {selectedItems.length} selected item{selectedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}
   106→          </Text>
   107→        </Pressable>
   108→      </View>
   109→
   110→      <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
   111→        <SummaryCard label="Active carts" value={String(summary.activeCarts.length)} />
   112→        <SummaryCard label="Items in vault" value={String(summary.itemCount)} />
   113→        <SummaryCard label="Completed spend" value={formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent)} />
   114→      </View>
   115→
   116→      <View style={styles.tabRow}>
   117→        {(['active', 'completed', 'insights'] as HomeTab[]).map(option => (
   118→          <Pressable
   119→            key={option}
   120→            style={[styles.tabButton, tab === option && styles.tabButtonActive]}
   121→            onPress={() => setTab(option)}
   122→          >
   123→            <Text style={[styles.tabButtonText, tab === option && styles.tabButtonTextActive]}>
   124→              {capitalize(option)}
   125→            </Text>
   126→          </Pressable>
   127→        ))}
   128→      </View>
   129→
   130→      {tab === 'active' ? (
   131→        <View style={styles.section}>
   132→          {summary.activeCarts.length ? (
   133→            summary.activeCarts.map(cart => (
   134→              <Pressable
   135→                key={cart.id}
   136→                style={styles.listCard}
   137→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   138→              >
   139→                <View>
   140→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   141→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   142→                    {cart.cartItems.length} items • Budget {formatCurrency(cart.budget)}
   143→                  </Text>
   144→                </View>
   145→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   146→              </Pressable>
   147→            ))
   148→          ) : (
   149→            <EmptyState
   150→              title="No active carts"
   151→              copy="Select items in Vault, then build your first planning cart from the quick-create card above."
   152→            />
   153→          )}
   154→        </View>
   155→      ) : null}
   156→
   157→      {tab === 'completed' ? (
   158→        <View style={styles.section}>
   159→          {summary.completedCarts.length ? (
   160→            summary.completedCarts.map(cart => (
   161→              <Pressable
   162→                key={cart.id}
   163→                style={styles.listCard}
   164→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   165→              >
   166→                <View>
   167→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   168→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   169→                    Completed {formatDate(cart.completedAt)}
   170→                  </Text>
   171→                </View>
   172→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   173→              </Pressable>
   174→            ))
   175→          ) : (
   176→            <EmptyState
   177→              title="No completed trips yet"
   178→              copy="Move a cart from planning to shopping and finish the trip to start building history."
   179→            />
   180→          )}
   181→        </View>
   182→      ) : null}
   183→
   184→      {tab === 'insights' ? (
   185→        <View style={styles.section}>
   186→          <View style={styles.card}>
   187→            <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Trip insights</Text>
   188→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   189→              {summary.overBudgetCount} completed cart{summary.overBudgetCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} finished over budget.
   190→            </Text>
   191→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   192→              Average spend per completed cart:{' '}
   193→              {summary.completedCarts.length
   194→                ? formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent / summary.completedCarts.length)
   195→                : formatCurrency(0)}
   196→            </Text>
   197→          </View>
   198→        </View>
   199→      ) : null}
   200→    </ScrollView>
   201→  );
   202→}
   203→
   204→function ActionButton({ label, onPress }: { label: string; onPress: () => void }) {
   205→  return (
   206→    <Pressable style={styles.actionButton} onPress={onPress}>
   207→      <Text style={styles.actionButtonText}>{label}</Text>
   208→    </Pressable>
   209→  );
   210→}
   211→
   212→function SummaryCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
   213→  return (
   214→    <View style={styles.summaryCard}>
   215→      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
   216→      <Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{value}</Text>
   217→    </View>
   218→  );
   219→}
   220→
   221→function EmptyState({ title, copy }: { title: string; copy: string }) {
   222→  return (
   223→    <View style={styles.emptyCard}>
   224→      <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>{title}</Text>
   225→      <Text style={styles.emptyCopy}>{copy}</Text>
   226→    </View>
   227→  );
   228→}

content.text:
Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the app. Let me compile the complete report for you.

## Thorough Exploration Report: Grock React Native Android Grocery App

Based on my comprehensive analysis of your codebase, here's the complete picture:

---

### 1. OVERALL FILE STRUCTURE

**Root Source Directory:** `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/`

The app follows a clean feature-based architecture with the following key directories:

```
src/
├── domain/              # Business logic & models
├── lib/                 # Utility functions (formatting, ID generation)
├── navigation/          # React Navigation setup & routing
├── screens/             # Screen components (organized by feature)
├── services/            # External services (subscriptions, RevenueCat)
├── state/               # Global state management (Zustand)
├── storage/             # Data persistence (SQLite, MMKV)
├── theme/               # Design tokens (colors)
└── types/               # TypeScript type definitions
```

---

### 2. SCREENS & NAVIGATION STRUCTURE

**Screens Directory:** `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/`

**Available Screens:**
- **HomeScreen** (`home/HomeScreen.tsx`) - Main dashboard with tabs (active carts, completed carts, insights)
- **VaultScreen** (`vault/VaultScreen.tsx`) - Browse/manage categories and items with selection for cart creation
- **CartDetailScreen** (`cart/CartDetailScreen.tsx`) - View individual cart with item fulfillment tracking
- **HistoryScreen** (`history/HistoryScreen.tsx`) - View completed shopping trips
- **MenuScreen** (`menu/MenuScreen.tsx`) - Settings, account, reset, share functionality
- **PaywallScreen** (`paywall/PaywallScreen.tsx`) - Subscription/Pro features (RevenueCat integration)
- **OnboardingFlow** (`onboarding/OnboardingFlow.tsx`) - 3-step onboarding (name, store, first item)
- **LoadingScreen** (`LoadingScreen.tsx`) - Initial bootstrap & error states

---

### 3. NAVIGATION SETUP

**Navigation File:** `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`

**Navigation Stack:** Using `@react-navigation/native-stack` with **NO bottom tab navigation currently**
- Single root `Stack.Navigator` with 6 main screens
- Navigation theme uses the color system from the theme
- Routes: Home, Vault, History, Menu, Paywall, CartDetail

**Navigation Types:** `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/navigation/types.ts`
```typescript
RootStackParamList = {
  Home: undefined;
  Vault: undefined;
  History: undefined;
  Menu: undefined;
  Paywall: undefined;
  CartDetail: { cartId: string };
}
```

**Current Navigation Pattern:**
- HomeScreen has action buttons to navigate to Vault, History, Menu, Paywall
- No native bottom tab navigation - purely stack-based navigation
- App.tsx → SafeAreaProvider + GestureHandlerRootView → RootNavigator

---

### 4. THEME & STYLING SYSTEM

**Theme Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/theme/colors.ts`

**Color Palette (Complete Design Token System):**
```typescript
canvas: '#fff8ef'        // Main background (warm beige)
surface: '#ffffff'       // Card/component background (white)
surfaceAlt: '#fff0d5'    // Alternate surface (light beige)
ink: '#211c16'          // Primary text (dark brown)
mutedInk: '#6f665d'     // Secondary text (muted brown)
line: '#eadbc6'         // Borders/dividers
brand: '#ef7f45'        // Primary action (orange)
brandDeep: '#db6331'    // Darker orange for emphasis
accent: '#7abf8a'       // Green accent
warning: '#e2a72f'      // Yellow warning
success: '#5aa66a'      // Green success
info: '#74a0d8'         // Blue info
danger: '#d86c5d'       // Red destructive
brandLight: '#ffe4d1'   // Light orange background
chip: '#f5e0bc'         // Chip background
shadow: 'rgba(33, 28, 22, 0.08)' // Default shadow
```

**Styling Pattern:**
- **StyleSheet.create()** used in every screen
- Each screen imports `colors` from theme
- Consistent component patterns:
  - **Cards:** `borderRadius: 20-24`, `backgroundColor: colors.surface`, `borderWidth: 1`, `borderColor: colors.line`
  - **Buttons:** Primary (orange `colors.brand`), Secondary (border-only), Danger (red `colors.danger`)
  - **Inputs:** `borderRadius: 16`, `backgroundColor: colors.canvas`, border
  - **Spacing:** Padding 16-20, gaps 8-18
  - **Font weights:** 600 (normal), 700 (medium), 800 (bold/headings)
  - **Font sizes:** 13 (small), 15-16 (body), 18 (card title), 30-34 (page title)

---

### 5. STATE MANAGEMENT

**Store File:** `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/state/useAppStore.ts`

**State Library:** **Zustand v5** (lightweight, hook-based)

**Store State Shape:**
```typescript
{
  isBootstrapping: boolean
  errorMessage: string | null
  appState: VaultAppState | null        // Main app data
  draftSelections: Record<string, number> // Item selections for quick cart
  subscription: SubscriptionSnapshot     // RevenueCat data
  
  // Actions
  bootstrap()
  refresh()
  completeOnboarding(input)
  updateUserName(name)
  addCategory(name, emoji)
  addItem(input)
  createCart(input)
  toggleCartItemFulfillment(cartId, cartItemId)
  advanceCartStatus(cartId)
  toggleDraftItem(itemId)
  setDraftQuantity(itemId, quantity)
  clearDraftSelections()
  resetApp()
}
```

**VaultAppState Structure:** (from models.ts)
- **user:** { id, name }
- **vault:** { categories[], carts[], stores[], deletedItems[], deletedCarts[], deletedCartItemSnapshots[] }
- **preferences:** { hasCompletedOnboarding, userName, isPro, freeEditableStoreKeys[], etc. }

---

### 6. PACKAGE.JSON DEPENDENCIES

**Key Libraries Already Installed:**

**Navigation & UI:**
- `@react-navigation/native` ^7.1.33
- `@react-navigation/native-stack` ^7.14.4
- `react-native-gesture-handler` ^2.30.0
- `react-native-reanimated` ^4.2.2
- `react-native-screens` ^4.24.0
- `react-native-safe-area-context` ^5.5.2

**State & Forms:**
- `zustand` ^5.0.11
- `react-hook-form` ^7.71.2
- `@hookform/resolvers` ^5.2.2
- `zod` ^4.3.6 (validation)

**Data & Storage:**
- `react-native-mmkv` ^4.2.0 (persistent store)
- `react-native-sqlite-storage` ^6.0.1 (database)

**Monetization & Services:**
- `react-native-purchases` ^9.11.1 (RevenueCat)

**Media & Content:**
- `react-native-video` ^6.19.0
- `react-native-webview` ^13.16.1
- `lottie-react-native` ^7.3.6
- `react-native-svg` ^15.15.3

**Utilities:**
- `react-native-share` ^12.2.5
- `@react-native-community/blur` ^4.4.1
- `react-native-nitro-modules` ^0.35.0
- `react-native-worklets` ^0.7.2

**React Versions:**
- `react` 19.2.3
- `react-native` 0.84.1

---

### 7. DESIGN SYSTEM COMPONENTS (Existing Patterns)

The app doesn't have a component library folder yet, but screens reuse common patterns:

**Common Component Patterns Found:**

1. **Cards**
   - Used everywhere for content grouping
   - Consistent padding (16-18), border radius (20-24), borders

2. **Buttons**
   - Primary: Orange background, white text, rounded

## Comprehensive Grock React Native App Exploration Report

### 2. SCREENS (7 total)

All screens are in `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/`:

1. **HomeScreen** (`home/HomeScreen.tsx`)

   - Browse/search categories and items

3. **CartDetailScreen** (`cart/CartDetailScreen.tsx`)

5. **MenuScreen** (`menu/MenuScreen.tsx`)

   - Share vault summary (via native share)

6. **OnboardingFlow** (`onboarding/OnboardingFlow.tsx`)
   - 3-step wizard: Name → Store → First Item

8. **LoadingScreen** (`LoadingScreen.tsx`)

### 3. DATA MODELS & TYPES

File: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/domain/models.ts`

**Core Types:**
- **Store**: `{id, name, createdAt}`
- **PricePerUnit**: `{priceValue, unit}`
- **PriceOption**: `{id, store, pricePerUnit}`
- **Item**: Complex with 27 fields including:
  - Basic: `id, name, categoryId, priceOptions, createdAt`
  - Shopping: `isTemporaryShoppingItem, shoppingPrice, shoppingUnit`
  - Sale: `isOnSale, saleType, discountValue, regularPrice, notes`
  - Soft delete: `isDeleted, deletedAt, deletedFromCategoryName`
  - Suppress: `isPlanSuppressed, planSuppressedAt, planSuppressedReason`

- **Category**: `{uid, name, emoji, sortOrder, colorHex, isPlanSuppressed..., items[]}`

- **CartItem**: 27 fields tracking:
  - Planning: `itemId, quantity, plannedStore, plannedPrice, plannedUnit`
  - Fulfillment: `isFulfilled, isSkippedDuringShopping, shouldShowCheckmark, shouldStrikethrough`
  - Actual (shopping phase): `actualStore, actualPrice, actualQuantity, actualUnit`
  - Metadata: `vaultItemNameSnapshot, vaultItemCategorySnapshot, notes, isOnSale`
  - Animation: `fulfillmentAnimationState (0-5), fulfillmentStartTime`
  - Shopping-only items: `isShoppingOnlyItem, shoppingOnlyName, shoppingOnlyStore, shoppingOnlyPrice`

- **Cart**: `{id, name, budget, status (planning|shopping|completed), fulfillmentStatus, createdAt, updatedAt, startedAt, completedAt, cartItems[]}`

- **Vault**: Container with `{categories[], carts[], stores[], deletedItems[], deletedCarts[], deletedCartItemSnapshots[]}`

- **PreferencesState**: Flags for onboarding, name prompts, guides, pro status, free tier limits
- **VaultAppState**: Root `{schemaVersion, user, vault, preferences}`

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the app. Let me create a detailed report:

## Comprehensive Grock React Native App Exploration Report

I've conducted a thorough analysis of the entire React Native migration of the Grock grocery planning app. Here's the complete breakdown:

### 1. APP ARCHITECTURE & STATE MANAGEMENT

**Stack:**
- **State**: Zustand (v5.0.11) - lightweight store at `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/state/useAppStore.ts`
- **Storage**: 
  - SQLite (via react-native-sqlite-storage v6.0.1) for persistent vault data
  - MMKV (react-native-mmkv v4.2.0) for preferences (encrypted key-value)
  - Database: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/storage/database.ts`
  - Repository pattern: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/storage/repository.ts`

**Navigation:**
- React Navigation v7 with Native Stack
- File: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`
- Stack routes: Home, Vault, History, Menu, Paywall, CartDetail

### 2. SCREENS (7 total)

All screens are in `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/`:

1. **HomeScreen** (`home/HomeScreen.tsx`)
   - Dashboard with 3 tabs: Active carts, Completed carts, Insights
   - Quick cart creation from vault selections
   - Uses `useMemo` for dashboard summary computation
   - Displays: Active cart count, item count, total completed spend
   - State: cartName, budget, tab selection

2. **VaultScreen** (`vault/VaultScreen.tsx`)
   - Browse/search categories and items
   - Add new categories with emoji
   - Add items to categories with price/unit/store
   - Multi-select items for cart creation
   - Category horizontal scrolling
   - Search filtering (by category or item name)
   - Quantity controls (+/- buttons, min 1)

3. **CartDetailScreen** (`cart/CartDetailScreen.tsx`)
   - View cart details (name, status, budget)
   - Toggle item fulfillment (Mark done/Fulfilled)
   - Summary pills: Total, Started, Completed dates
   - Status progression: Planning → Shopping → Completed

4. **HistoryScreen** (`history/HistoryScreen.tsx`)
   - View all completed carts
   - Shows completion date and total spend
   - Simple readonly list view

5. **MenuScreen** (`menu/MenuScreen.tsx`)
   - Update user name
   - View subscription state (isPro, free editable stores)
   - Share vault summary (via native share)
   - Danger zone: Reset local state with confirmation alert

6. **OnboardingFlow** (`onboarding/OnboardingFlow.tsx`)
   - 3-step wizard: Name → Store → First Item
   - Step indicators (pills)
   - Category selection for first item (horizontal scrolling)
   - Form validation with alerts
   - Date/time stamping

7. **PaywallScreen** (`paywall/PaywallScreen.tsx`)
   - RevenueCat integration status
   - Subscription state display
   - Current offering info
   - Refresh subscription button

8. **LoadingScreen** (`LoadingScreen.tsx`)
   - Reusable spinner screen
   - Uses ActivityIndicator

### 3. DATA MODELS & TYPES

File: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/domain/models.ts`

**Core Types:**
- **Store**: `{id, name, createdAt}`
- **PricePerUnit**: `{priceValue, unit}`
- **PriceOption**: `{id, store, pricePerUnit}`
- **Item**: Complex with 27 fields including:
  - Basic: `id, name, categoryId, priceOptions, createdAt`
  - Shopping: `isTemporaryShoppingItem, shoppingPrice, shoppingUnit`
  - Sale: `isOnSale, saleType, discountValue, regularPrice, notes`
  - Soft delete: `isDeleted, deletedAt, deletedFromCategoryName`
  - Suppress: `isPlanSuppressed, planSuppressedAt, planSuppressedReason`

- **Category**: `{uid, name, emoji, sortOrder, colorHex, isPlanSuppressed..., items[]}`

- **CartItem**: 27 fields tracking:
  - Planning: `itemId, quantity, plannedStore, plannedPrice, plannedUnit`
  - Fulfillment: `isFulfilled, isSkippedDuringShopping, shouldShowCheckmark, shouldStrikethrough`
  - Actual (shopping phase): `actualStore, actualPrice, actualQuantity, actualUnit`
  - Metadata: `vaultItemNameSnapshot, vaultItemCategorySnapshot, notes, isOnSale`
  - Animation: `fulfillmentAnimationState (0-5), fulfillmentStartTime`
  - Shopping-only items: `isShoppingOnlyItem, shoppingOnlyName, shoppingOnlyStore, shoppingOnlyPrice`

- **Cart**: `{id, name, budget, status (planning|shopping|completed), fulfillmentStatus, createdAt, updatedAt, startedAt, completedAt, cartItems[]}`

- **Vault**: Container with `{categories[], carts[], stores[], deletedItems[], deletedCarts[], deletedCartItemSnapshots[]}`

- **PreferencesState**: Flags for onboarding, name prompts, guides, pro status, free tier limits
- **VaultAppState**: Root `{schemaVersion, user, vault, preferences}`

**Helper Functions:**
- `createInitialAppState()` - Seeds 17 default categories
- `computeCartTotal()` - Totals cart items (handles planning vs completed status)
- `computeDashboardSummary()` - Aggregates stats
- `getCategoryById()`, `getItemById()` - Lookups
- `getCurrentPrice()`, `getCurrentUnit()` - Price option queries
- `createCartItemFromVaultItem()` - Factory for adding vault items to carts
- `completeOnboardingState()` - Hydrates initial state

**Cart Status Progression:**
- `planning` → `shopping` → `completed`
- Timestamps: `createdAt`, `startedAt`, `completedAt`

### 4. REUSABLE COMPONENTS

Screens use **inline component functions** (no separate component library):

**HomeScreen subcomponents:**
- `ActionButton` - Navigation buttons
- `SummaryCard` - Stats display cards
- `EmptyState` - Placeholder messages

**CartDetailScreen subcomponents:**
- `SummaryPill` - Label/value pill display

**All screens use native RN components:**
- `ScrollView`, `View`, `Text`, `Pressable`, `TextInput`
- `Alert` for confirmations (MenuScreen)

### 5. CUSTOM HOOKS

**No custom hooks found.** Only:
- `useAppStore` (Zustand) - global state
- `useMemo` - HomeScreen dashboard summary, VaultScreen filtered categories
- `useState` - local form state in screens

### 6. ANIMATIONS

**Status:** No animation libraries currently used (Reanimated & Lottie are installed but not imported)

**Animation infrastructure exists** but disabled:
- `FulfillmentAnimationState` (enum 0-5) in CartItem model
- Fields: `fulfillmentAnimationState`, `fulfillmentStartTime`, `shouldShowCheckmark`, `shouldStrikethrough`
- Suggests planned checkmark/strikethrough animations on item fulfillment

### 7. ACCESSIBILITY

**Status:** No accessibility implementations found

**Gap identified:**
- No `accessibilityLabel`, `accessibilityRole`, or `accessible` props
- No semantic labels on buttons, form inputs, or lists
- No aria-live equivalents
- All interactive elements missing a11y metadata

### 8. API/SERVICE LAYER

**SubscriptionService** (`/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/services/subscriptionService.ts`)
- Wraps react-native-purchases (RevenueCat)
- Methods: `refresh()` 
- State: `isConfigured, isPro, isLoading, errorMessage, currentOffering, customerInfo`
- Returns `SubscriptionSnapshot` interface
- Currently unconfigured (returns early with message)

**AppRepository** (`/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/storage/repository.ts`)
- Data access layer for all state mutations
- Methods:
  - `loadState()` - Load from SQLite, hydrate preferences from MMKV
  - `persistState()` - Save to SQLite + MMKV
  - `mutate(mutator)` - Load → Transform → Save pattern
  - `completeOnboarding()`, `updateUserName()`, `addCategory()`, `addItem()`, `createCart()`, `toggleCartItemFulfillment()`, `advanceCartStatus()`, `resetState()`
  - `getDashboard()` - Compute summary
  - Private: `hydratePreferences()`, `persistPreferences()`

### 9. THEME & STYLING

File: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/theme/colors.ts`

**Color palette (warm, grocery-focused):**
- Canvas: `#fff8ef` (warm white)
- Surface: `#ffffff` (white)
- SurfaceAlt: `#fff0d5` (cream)
- Ink: `#211c16` (dark brown)
- MutedInk: `#6f665d` (taupe)
- Line: `#eadbc6` (light beige)
- Brand: `#ef7f45` (bright orange)
- BrandDeep: `#db6331` (darker orange)
- Accent: `#7abf8a` (green)
- Semantic: warning, success, info, danger
- BrandLight: `#ffe4d1` (light peach)
- Shadow: `rgba(33, 28, 22, 0.08)`

**Styling approach:**
- `StyleSheet.create()` for all screens
- Consistent spacing (gap: 10-18px)
- Border radius: 14-24px (rounded)
- Typography: fontWeight 600-800, fontSize 12-34px
- No global stylesheet - each screen is self-contained

**Format utilities** (`/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/lib/format.ts`):
- `capitalize()`
- `formatCurrency()` - USD with 2 decimals
- `formatDate()` - "MMM d, yyyy" format

### 10. ID GENERATION

File: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/lib/id.ts`

```
createId(prefix) = `${prefix}_${Date.now().toString(36)}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10)}`
```
Example: `cart_1f0x2k8_a1b2c3d4`

### 11. DEFAULT CATEGORIES

File: `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/domain/defaultCategories.ts`

**17 seed categories** with slug, title, emoji, pastel hex, and placeholder text:
- Fresh Produce, Meats & Seafood, Dairy & Eggs, Frozen
- Condiments & Ingredients, Pantry, Bakery & Bread, Beverages
- Ready Meals, Personal Care, Health, Cleaning & Household
- Pets, Baby, Home & Garden, Electronics & Hobbies, Stationery

### 12. STATE MANAGEMENT FLOW

**AppStore (Zustand) structure:**
```
{
  isBootstrapping: boolean
  errorMessage: string | null
  appState: VaultAppState | null
  draftSelections: Record<itemId, quantity>
  subscription: SubscriptionSnapshot
  
  // Methods
  bootstrap(), refresh(), completeOnboarding(), updateUserName()
  addCategory(), addItem(), createCart()
  toggleCartItemFulfillment(), advanceCartStatus()
  toggleDraftItem(), setDraftQuantity(), clearDraftSelections()
  resetApp()
}
```

**Hooks pattern:**
- All state accessed via `useAppStore(state => state.property)`
- All mutations via store methods (never direct state manipulation)
- Draft selections managed locally for multi-select before cart creation

### 13. LIST RENDERING PATTERNS

**FlatList not used.** All lists use:
- `ScrollView` + `.map()` for small, dynamic lists
- Categories: 17 items (manageable)
- Cart items: Variable, typically < 50 (manageable)
- Completed carts: Variable

**Performance consideration:** App works because lists are small, but large grocery lists might need `FlatList` optimization.

### 14. FORM PATTERNS

**No form library used.** All forms manually:
- `useState` for each input
- `TextInput` with `onChangeText`
- Validation on submit button press
- Error alerts via `Alert.alert()`
- Reset inputs after successful submission

**Form validations:**
- Required fields checked with `.trim()`
- Numeric fields: `Number.isFinite(parsedValue)`
- Price validation: > 0

### 15. NAVIGATION PATTERNS

- **Stack navigation** only (no tabs, drawers)
- **Route params:** `CartDetail` receives `cartId`
- **Deep linking not configured**
- Navigation object from props: `navigation.navigate('RouteName', params)`

### 16. TESTING

File: `/__tests__/domain.test.ts`
- Jest tests for domain helper functions
- Tests: `completeOnboardingState`, `computeCartTotal`, `createCartItemFromVaultItem`
- Focused on business logic, not UI

### 17. BUILD & CONFIG

- **Package.json:** React 19.2.3, React Native 0.84.1
- **Dependencies:** 20 total
- **Key libraries:** React Navigation, Zustand, MMKV, SQLite, RevenueCat, React Hook Form (installed but not used)
- **Typescript:** Strict mode configured
- **Linting:** ESLint, Prettier configured

### CURRENT UX PATTERNS SUMMARY

1. **Card-based layout:** All screens use rounded cards with borders
2. **Color coding:** Brand orange for CTAs, semantic colors for states
3. **Inline actions:** Buttons/controls within cards, no separate action sheets
4. **Horizontal scrolling:** Categories (VaultScreen), onboarding categories
5. **Tab switching:** HomeScreen uses pill buttons for tab selection
6. **State progression:** Linear cart flow (planning → shopping → completed)
7. **Quantity controls:** +/- buttons for multi-select
8. **Soft delete:** Items marked deleted but retained (privacy/recovery)
9. **Snapshots:** Cart items snapshot vault names/categories (immutability)
10. **Draft pattern:** Selected items held locally before cart creation

---

## FILE PATHS SUMMARY

**Screens:**
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/home/HomeScreen.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/vault/VaultScreen.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/cart/CartDetailScreen.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/history/HistoryScreen.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/menu/MenuScreen.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/onboarding/OnboardingFlow.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/paywall/PaywallScreen.tsx`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/screens/LoadingScreen.tsx`

**Core Logic:**
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/domain/models.ts` (all types & helpers)
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/state/useAppStore.ts` (Zustand store)
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/storage/repository.ts` (data access)
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/storage/database.ts` (SQLite setup)
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`

**Theme & Utils:**
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/theme/colors.ts`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/lib/format.ts`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/lib/id.ts`
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/domain/defaultCategories.ts`

**Services:**
- `/c/Users/johnm/Grock/mobile/src/services/subscriptionService.ts`

This is a clean, well-structured MVP with strong foundations for adding accessibility, animations, and more sophisticated UX patterns.
Excellent exploration. Now I have a comprehensive picture of your app. Let me move to Phase 2 — designing the implementation approach.

input.prompt:
You are a senior React Native UI/UX architect. Design a detailed implementation plan for a Material You-inspired bottom tab navigation and overall navigation redesign for a grocery price comparison app called "Grock".

## Current State
- React Navigation v7 with native-stack only (no bottom tabs)
- Stack routes: Home, Vault, History, Menu, Paywall, CartDetail
- RootNavigator at: src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx
- Navigation types at: src/navigation/types.ts
- App.tsx wraps with SafeAreaProvider + GestureHandlerRootView
- Libraries already installed: @react-navigation/native v7, react-native-reanimated v4.2.2, react-native-screens, react-native-gesture-handler, react-native-svg
- Color tokens at src/theme/colors.ts: brand=#ef7f45, canvas=#fff8ef, surface=#ffffff, ink=#211c16, mutedInk=#6f665d, line=#eadbc6, accent=#7abf8a
- Android-only, New Architecture enabled, RN 0.84.1

## Requirements
1. Add @react-navigation/bottom-tabs for a Material You-style bottom tab bar
2. Tabs should be: Home (dashboard), Vault (item catalog), Cart (active cart or cart list), Menu (settings)
3. The tab bar should have:
   - Custom animated tab icons (Reanimated 3) with scale/color transitions
   - Active tab indicator pill (Material You style - rounded pill behind active icon)
   - Badge on Cart tab showing item count
   - Elevation shadow consistent with Material You
   - 60fps animations
4. CartDetail and Paywall remain as stack screens overlaying the tab navigator
5. History should be accessible from Home screen, not a separate tab
6. OnboardingFlow should be shown before tabs if !hasCompletedOnboarding

## Design Constraints
- Must use existing color tokens from colors.ts
- Must be fully accessible (TalkBack labels, roles, minimum touch targets 48x48)
- Must maintain type safety with TypeScript
- Keep file structure clean: src/navigation/, src/components/navigation/

Provide:
1. New navigation architecture (nested navigators)
2. Exact file structure changes
3. Component breakdown for custom tab bar
4. Animation specifications (Reanimated shared values, interpolation)
5. Accessibility implementation details
6. Type definitions needed

input.prompt:
You are a senior React Native UI/UX architect specializing in Material You design for grocery apps. Design detailed redesign plans for the 3 most important screens in a grocery app called "Grock".

## Current App Context
- React Native 0.84.1, Android-only, New Architecture enabled
- State: Zustand v5 store at src/state/useAppStore.ts
- Models at src/domain/models.ts with types: Category, Item, Cart, CartItem, PriceOption, Store
- Libraries available: react-native-reanimated v4.2.2, lottie-react-native, react-native-svg, @react-native-community/blur, zod, react-hook-form
- Color tokens: brand=#ef7f45, canvas=#fff8ef, surface=#ffffff, ink=#211c16, mutedInk=#6f665d, line=#eadbc6, accent=#7abf8a, brandDeep=#db6331, brandLight=#ffe4d1, chip=#f5e0bc, success=#5aa66a, warning=#e2a72f, danger=#d86c5d, shadow=rgba(33,28,22,0.08)
- Current styling: StyleSheet.create, borderRadius 20-24, fontWeight 600-800
- NO accessibility currently implemented
- NO animations currently used (libraries installed but unused)
- All lists use ScrollView + .map() (no FlatList/FlashList)
- No reusable component library exists yet

## Current Screens to Redesign

### 1. VaultScreen (src/screens/vault/VaultScreen.tsx) - The "Search/Browse" Screen
Current: Category horizontal scroll + item list with add forms inline. ScrollView + .map().
This serves as the item catalog where users browse categories, search items, and select items for cart.

### 2. CartDetailScreen (src/screens/cart/CartDetailScreen.tsx) - The "Comparison/Shopping" Screen
Current: Shows cart items with fulfillment toggles, budget info, status progression (planning→shopping→completed).
Cart items have planned vs actual price/store comparisons.

### 3. HomeScreen (src/screens/home/HomeScreen.tsx) - The "Cart/Dashboard" Screen  
Current: 3 tabs (active/completed/insights), action buttons for navigation, summary cards. Quick cart creation from draft selections.

## Requirements for Each Screen

### General
- Material You design language (dynamic shapes, elevation, rounded corners)
- 60fps performance (FlatList with memo, Reanimated for micro-interactions)
- Full TalkBack accessibility (labels, roles, hints, live regions)
- Delightful micro-interactions where they add value for grocery shoppers

### VaultScreen Redesign
- Search bar with animated focus state
- Category chips with animated selection
- Item cards showing best price, store comparison at a glance
- Smooth add-to-cart gesture (swipe or tap with satisfying feedback)
- FlatList with section headers by category
- Empty state animations

### CartDetailScreen Redesign
- Progress indicator showing cart completion %
- Swipe-to-fulfill items with haptic-like visual feedback
- Budget vs actual spend visualization (progress bar or gauge)
- Store grouping option (group items by store for efficient shopping)
- Animated checkmark on fulfillment (use fulfillmentAnimationState 0-5)
- Floating summary bar at bottom

### HomeScreen Redesign
- Welcome header with user name
- Active cart cards with progress preview
- Quick actions (create cart, browse vault)
- Insights section with spend trends
- Animated transitions between content

For each screen provide:
1. UX improvement explanation (why it works for grocery shoppers)
2. Component breakdown (what components to create)
3. Animation specifications (Reanimated shared values, spring configs)
4. Accessibility implementation
5. Performance optimizations
6. Exact file paths for new/modified files

1→import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
     2→import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
     3→import {
     4→  Pressable,
     5→  ScrollView,
     6→  StyleSheet,
     7→  Text,
     8→  TextInput,
     9→  View,
    10→} from 'react-native';
    11→
    12→import { computeCartTotal, computeDashboardSummary } from '../../domain/models';
    13→import { capitalize, formatCurrency, formatDate } from '../../lib/format';
    14→import { RootStackParamList } from '../../navigation/types';
    15→import { useAppStore } from '../../state/useAppStore';
    16→import { colors } from '../../theme/colors';
    17→
    18→type Props = NativeStackScreenProps<RootStackParamList, 'Home'>;
    19→type HomeTab = 'active' | 'completed' | 'insights';
    20→
    21→export function HomeScreen({ navigation }: Props) {
    22→  const appState = useAppStore(state => state.appState);
    23→  const draftSelections = useAppStore(state => state.draftSelections);
    24→  const createCart = useAppStore(state => state.createCart);
    25→  const [tab, setTab] = useState<HomeTab>('active');
    26→  const [cartName, setCartName] = useState('');
    27→  const [budget, setBudget] = useState('120');
    28→
    29→  const summary = useMemo(() => (appState ? computeDashboardSummary(appState) : null), [appState]);
    30→
    31→  if (!appState || !summary) {
    32→    return null;
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const selectedItems = Object.entries(draftSelections).map(([itemId, quantity]) => ({
    36→    itemId,
    37→    quantity,
    38→  }));
    39→
    40→  const handleCreateCart = async () => {
    41→    if (!selectedItems.length) {
    42→      return;
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    const parsedBudget = Number(budget);
    46→    if (!cartName.trim() || !Number.isFinite(parsedBudget)) {
    47→      return;
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    await createCart({
    51→      name: cartName,
    52→      budget: parsedBudget,
    53→      selectedItems,
    54→    });
    55→
    56→    setCartName('');
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  return (
    60→    <ScrollView style={styles.screen} contentContainerStyle={styles.content}>
    61→      <View style={styles.hero}>
    62→        <Text style={styles.eyebrow}>Grock</Text>
    63→        <Text style={styles.title}>Hi {appState.user.name || 'there'}</Text>
    64→        <Text style={styles.subtitle}>
    65→          Ready to plan your next grocery run? Browse your vault, build a cart,
    66→          and let Grock keep you on budget.
    67→        </Text>
    68→      </View>
    69→
    70→      <View style={styles.actionRow}>
    71→        <ActionButton label="Vault" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Vault')} />
    72→        <ActionButton label="History" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')} />
    73→        <ActionButton label="Menu" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Menu')} />
    74→        <ActionButton label="Paywall" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Paywall')} />
    75→      </View>
    76→
    77→      <View style={styles.card}>
    78→        <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Quick cart from vault selection</Text>
    79→        <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
    80→          Select items in Vault, then create a planning cart here.
    81→        </Text>
    82→        <TextInput
    83→          style={styles.input}
    84→          value={cartName}
    85→          onChangeText={setCartName}
    86→          placeholder="Weekend groceries"
    87→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    88→        />
    89→        <TextInput
    90→          style={styles.input}
    91→          value={budget}
    92→          onChangeText={setBudget}
    93→          placeholder="Budget"
    94→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    95→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
    96→        />
    97→        <Pressable
    98→          style={[styles.primaryButton, !selectedItems.length && styles.buttonDisabled]}
    99→          onPress={() => {
   100→            handleCreateCart().catch(() => undefined);
   101→          }}
   102→          disabled={!selectedItems.length}
   103→        >
   104→          <Text style={styles.primaryButtonText}>
   105→            Create cart from {selectedItems.length} selected item{selectedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}
   106→          </Text>
   107→        </Pressable>
   108→      </View>
   109→
   110→      <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
   111→        <SummaryCard label="Active carts" value={String(summary.activeCarts.length)} />
   112→        <SummaryCard label="Items in vault" value={String(summary.itemCount)} />
   113→        <SummaryCard label="Completed spend" value={formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent)} />
   114→      </View>
   115→
   116→      <View style={styles.tabRow}>
   117→        {(['active', 'completed', 'insights'] as HomeTab[]).map(option => (
   118→          <Pressable
   119→            key={option}
   120→            style={[styles.tabButton, tab === option && styles.tabButtonActive]}
   121→            onPress={() => setTab(option)}
   122→          >
   123→            <Text style={[styles.tabButtonText, tab === option && styles.tabButtonTextActive]}>
   124→              {capitalize(option)}
   125→            </Text>
   126→          </Pressable>
   127→        ))}
   128→      </View>
   129→
   130→      {tab === 'active' ? (
   131→        <View style={styles.section}>
   132→          {summary.activeCarts.length ? (
   133→            summary.activeCarts.map(cart => (
   134→              <Pressable
   135→                key={cart.id}
   136→                style={styles.listCard}
   137→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   138→              >
   139→                <View>
   140→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   141→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   142→                    {cart.cartItems.length} items • Budget {formatCurrency(cart.budget)}
   143→                  </Text>
   144→                </View>
   145→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   146→              </Pressable>
   147→            ))
   148→          ) : (
   149→            <EmptyState
   150→              title="No active carts"
   151→              copy="Select items in Vault, then build your first planning cart from the quick-create card above."
   152→            />
   153→          )}
   154→        </View>
   155→      ) : null}
   156→
   157→      {tab === 'completed' ? (
   158→        <View style={styles.section}>
   159→          {summary.completedCarts.length ? (
   160→            summary.completedCarts.map(cart => (
   161→              <Pressable
   162→                key={cart.id}
   163→                style={styles.listCard}
   164→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   165→              >
   166→                <View>
   167→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   168→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   169→                    Completed {formatDate(cart.completedAt)}
   170→                  </Text>
   171→                </View>
   172→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   173→              </Pressable>
   174→            ))
   175→          ) : (
   176→            <EmptyState
   177→              title="No completed trips yet"
   178→              copy="Move a cart from planning to shopping and finish the trip to start building history."
   179→            />
   180→          )}
   181→        </View>
   182→      ) : null}
   183→
   184→      {tab === 'insights' ? (
   185→        <View style={styles.section}>
   186→          <View style={styles.card}>
   187→            <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Trip insights</Text>
   188→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   189→              {summary.overBudgetCount} completed cart{summary.overBudgetCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} finished over budget.
   190→            </Text>
   191→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   192→              Average spend per completed cart:{' '}
   193→              {summary.completedCarts.length
   194→                ? formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent / summary.completedCarts.length)
   195→                : formatCurrency(0)}
   196→            </Text>
   197→          </View>
   198→        </View>
   199→      ) : null}
   200→    </ScrollView>
   201→  );
   202→}
   203→
   204→function ActionButton({ label, onPress }: { label: string; onPress: () => void }) {
   205→  return (
   206→    <Pressable style={styles.actionButton} onPress={onPress}>
   207→      <Text style={styles.actionButtonText}>{label}</Text>
   208→    </Pressable>
   209→  );
   210→}
   211→
   212→function SummaryCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
   213→  return (
   214→    <View style={styles.summaryCard}>
   215→      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
   216→      <Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{value}</Text>
   217→    </View>
   218→  );
   219→}
   220→
   221→function EmptyState({ title, copy }: { title: string; copy: string }) {
   222→  return (
   223→    <View style={styles.emptyCard}>
   224→      <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>{title}</Text>
   225→      <Text style={styles.emptyCopy}>{copy}</Text>
   226→    </View>
   227→  );
   228→}

1→import { NativeStackScreenProps } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
     2→import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
     3→import {
     4→  Pressable,
     5→  ScrollView,
     6→  StyleSheet,
     7→  Text,
     8→  TextInput,
     9→  View,
    10→} from 'react-native';
    11→
    12→import { computeCartTotal, computeDashboardSummary } from '../../domain/models';
    13→import { capitalize, formatCurrency, formatDate } from '../../lib/format';
    14→import { RootStackParamList } from '../../navigation/types';
    15→import { useAppStore } from '../../state/useAppStore';
    16→import { colors } from '../../theme/colors';
    17→
    18→type Props = NativeStackScreenProps<RootStackParamList, 'Home'>;
    19→type HomeTab = 'active' | 'completed' | 'insights';
    20→
    21→export function HomeScreen({ navigation }: Props) {
    22→  const appState = useAppStore(state => state.appState);
    23→  const draftSelections = useAppStore(state => state.draftSelections);
    24→  const createCart = useAppStore(state => state.createCart);
    25→  const [tab, setTab] = useState<HomeTab>('active');
    26→  const [cartName, setCartName] = useState('');
    27→  const [budget, setBudget] = useState('120');
    28→
    29→  const summary = useMemo(() => (appState ? computeDashboardSummary(appState) : null), [appState]);
    30→
    31→  if (!appState || !summary) {
    32→    return null;
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const selectedItems = Object.entries(draftSelections).map(([itemId, quantity]) => ({
    36→    itemId,
    37→    quantity,
    38→  }));
    39→
    40→  const handleCreateCart = async () => {
    41→    if (!selectedItems.length) {
    42→      return;
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    const parsedBudget = Number(budget);
    46→    if (!cartName.trim() || !Number.isFinite(parsedBudget)) {
    47→      return;
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    await createCart({
    51→      name: cartName,
    52→      budget: parsedBudget,
    53→      selectedItems,
    54→    });
    55→
    56→    setCartName('');
    57→  };
    58→
    59→  return (
    60→    <ScrollView style={styles.screen} contentContainerStyle={styles.content}>
    61→      <View style={styles.hero}>
    62→        <Text style={styles.eyebrow}>Grock</Text>
    63→        <Text style={styles.title}>Hi {appState.user.name || 'there'}</Text>
    64→        <Text style={styles.subtitle}>
    65→          Ready to plan your next grocery run? Browse your vault, build a cart,
    66→          and let Grock keep you on budget.
    67→        </Text>
    68→      </View>
    69→
    70→      <View style={styles.actionRow}>
    71→        <ActionButton label="Vault" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Vault')} />
    72→        <ActionButton label="History" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')} />
    73→        <ActionButton label="Menu" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Menu')} />
    74→        <ActionButton label="Paywall" onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Paywall')} />
    75→      </View>
    76→
    77→      <View style={styles.card}>
    78→        <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Quick cart from vault selection</Text>
    79→        <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
    80→          Select items in Vault, then create a planning cart here.
    81→        </Text>
    82→        <TextInput
    83→          style={styles.input}
    84→          value={cartName}
    85→          onChangeText={setCartName}
    86→          placeholder="Weekend groceries"
    87→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    88→        />
    89→        <TextInput
    90→          style={styles.input}
    91→          value={budget}
    92→          onChangeText={setBudget}
    93→          placeholder="Budget"
    94→          placeholderTextColor={colors.mutedInk}
    95→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
    96→        />
    97→        <Pressable
    98→          style={[styles.primaryButton, !selectedItems.length && styles.buttonDisabled]}
    99→          onPress={() => {
   100→            handleCreateCart().catch(() => undefined);
   101→          }}
   102→          disabled={!selectedItems.length}
   103→        >
   104→          <Text style={styles.primaryButtonText}>
   105→            Create cart from {selectedItems.length} selected item{selectedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}
   106→          </Text>
   107→        </Pressable>
   108→      </View>
   109→
   110→      <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
   111→        <SummaryCard label="Active carts" value={String(summary.activeCarts.length)} />
   112→        <SummaryCard label="Items in vault" value={String(summary.itemCount)} />
   113→        <SummaryCard label="Completed spend" value={formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent)} />
   114→      </View>
   115→
   116→      <View style={styles.tabRow}>
   117→        {(['active', 'completed', 'insights'] as HomeTab[]).map(option => (
   118→          <Pressable
   119→            key={option}
   120→            style={[styles.tabButton, tab === option && styles.tabButtonActive]}
   121→            onPress={() => setTab(option)}
   122→          >
   123→            <Text style={[styles.tabButtonText, tab === option && styles.tabButtonTextActive]}>
   124→              {capitalize(option)}
   125→            </Text>
   126→          </Pressable>
   127→        ))}
   128→      </View>
   129→
   130→      {tab === 'active' ? (
   131→        <View style={styles.section}>
   132→          {summary.activeCarts.length ? (
   133→            summary.activeCarts.map(cart => (
   134→              <Pressable
   135→                key={cart.id}
   136→                style={styles.listCard}
   137→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   138→              >
   139→                <View>
   140→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   141→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   142→                    {cart.cartItems.length} items • Budget {formatCurrency(cart.budget)}
   143→                  </Text>
   144→                </View>
   145→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   146→              </Pressable>
   147→            ))
   148→          ) : (
   149→            <EmptyState
   150→              title="No active carts"
   151→              copy="Select items in Vault, then build your first planning cart from the quick-create card above."
   152→            />
   153→          )}
   154→        </View>
   155→      ) : null}
   156→
   157→      {tab === 'completed' ? (
   158→        <View style={styles.section}>
   159→          {summary.completedCarts.length ? (
   160→            summary.completedCarts.map(cart => (
   161→              <Pressable
   162→                key={cart.id}
   163→                style={styles.listCard}
   164→                onPress={() => navigation.navigate('CartDetail', { cartId: cart.id })}
   165→              >
   166→                <View>
   167→                  <Text style={styles.listTitle}>{cart.name}</Text>
   168→                  <Text style={styles.listMeta}>
   169→                    Completed {formatDate(cart.completedAt)}
   170→                  </Text>
   171→                </View>
   172→                <Text style={styles.listValue}>{formatCurrency(computeCartTotal(appState.vault, cart))}</Text>
   173→              </Pressable>
   174→            ))
   175→          ) : (
   176→            <EmptyState
   177→              title="No completed trips yet"
   178→              copy="Move a cart from planning to shopping and finish the trip to start building history."
   179→            />
   180→          )}
   181→        </View>
   182→      ) : null}
   183→
   184→      {tab === 'insights' ? (
   185→        <View style={styles.section}>
   186→          <View style={styles.card}>
   187→            <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Trip insights</Text>
   188→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   189→              {summary.overBudgetCount} completed cart{summary.overBudgetCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} finished over budget.
   190→            </Text>
   191→            <Text style={styles.cardCopy}>
   192→              Average spend per completed cart:{' '}
   193→              {summary.completedCarts.length
   194→                ? formatCurrency(summary.totalSpent / summary.completedCarts.length)
   195→                : formatCurrency(0)}
   196→            </Text>
   197→          </View>
   198→        </View>
   199→      ) : null}
   200→    </ScrollView>
   201→  );
   202→}
   203→
   204→function ActionButton({ label, onPress }: { label: string; onPress: () => void }) {
   205→  return (
   206→    <Pressable style={styles.actionButton} onPress={onPress}>
   207→      <Text style={styles.actionButtonText}>{label}</Text>
   208→    </Pressable>
   209→  );
   210→}
   211→
   212→function SummaryCard({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {
   213→  return (
   214→    <View style={styles.summaryCard}>
   215→      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
   216→      <Text style={styles.summaryValue}>{value}</Text>
   217→    </View>
   218→  );
   219→}
   220→
   221→function EmptyState({ title, copy }: { title: string; copy: string }) {
   222→  return (
   223→    <View style={styles.emptyCard}>
   224→      <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>{title}</Text>
   225→      <Text style={styles.emptyCopy}>{copy}</Text>
   226→    </View>
   227→  );
   228→}
